notes: Used skill workflow A: brief.json -> program_to_skeleton.mjs (initial 416 sqft layout missing config block), then hand-tuned to a 24x20=480 sqft layout with explicit config block. Wet-wall sharing between Kitchen and Bath. Initial validate failed due to overlapping connections at 50% on SleepingArea.top; staggered to 13/46/83% and re-validated cleanly (valid:true, 0 warnings). Rendered plan.png + plan.svg. Renderer emits a stale config_missing_default_unit warning despite the config block being present, but render exit was 0.
